title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Advanced Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Advanced Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='120' y='120' width='160' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/><rect x='120' y='180' width='160' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/><g textAnchor='middle' dominantBaseline='central' fill='#C06C88'><text x='40' y='30' fontSize='18' textAnchor='start'>Product Grid</text><text x='180' y='150' fontSize='16' textAnchor='middle'>Filter by:</text><text x='180' y='210' fontSize='16' textAnchor='middle'>Search Products</text></g>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must have interactive filter options and search bar
Must update product grid dynamically based on filter options and search input

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Advanced Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Verify the product grid is rendered correctly with proper filtering and sorting.
Check if filter options are interactive and update the product grid dynamically.
Evaluate if the search bar works correctly and filters the product grid accordingly.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
